mapper.insert: INSERT INTO alerts (type, content, sender_type, sender_id, detail_sender_id, user_id, sender_user_id) VALUES (#{type}, #{content}, #{senderType}, #{senderId}, #{detailSenderId}, #{userId}, #{senderUserId})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM alerts WHERE user_id=#{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY send_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM alerts WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND alerts_check_status = 0 AND is_deleted = 0
